title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik Consulting Pvt Ltd!
